title: Walk on
desc: To stand on the lunar surface and look back at a pale blue dot hanging in the void. To feel the silence of a world without wind, and to know that humans are capable of extraordinary things when they dare to reach beyond the horizon. This dream shaped how I think about ambition — no goal is too far if you build toward it one step at a time.

title: Physical AI
desc: The next frontier isn't the cloud — it's the real world. I want to build AI systems that perceive, reason, and act in physical space: robots that help people, autonomous agents that navigate real environments, and embodied intelligence that bridges software and the atoms around us. The gap between digital intelligence and physical agency is the most exciting problem of our time.

title: Large-Scale
desc: Training the next generation of foundation models requires infrastructure at a scale most engineers never touch — thousands of GPUs orchestrated in perfect synchrony, petabytes of data flowing through purpose-built networks, distributed systems designed to survive failure at every layer. I want to be the engineer who designs, builds, and scales that infrastructure. I will be ready when scaling law in robotics hits.
